overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked dystopian city. The vehicle navigates from commercial streets through a tunnel into an industrial district, featuring heavy rainfall, neon signage, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy commercial city street with pedestrian walkways

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: walking with umbrella along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade
illuminated advertising screen with colorful neon display
concrete walkway with pedestrians holding umbrellas
silver metal barrier separating road from sidewalk
vertical traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked commercial district with modern glass buildings and digital billboards. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the right sidewalk while the vehicle follows the wet asphalt road. The sky is overcast with heavy rain reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approaching elevated highway underpass

events.description: driving under concrete overpasses with reduced sky visibility and sheltered conditions
approaching dark tunnel entrance with artificial lighting becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through underpasses and approaching tunnel entrance

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning the road
bright orange plastic construction barriers lining the sidewalk
dark tunnel opening with concrete frame and overhead lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives under massive concrete overpasses that partially shelter the road from rain. The environment transitions from commercial to industrial as the tunnel entrance looms ahead. Orange construction barriers line the right side of the narrowing road.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete tunnel with overhead lighting and debris

events.description: entering dark tunnel with red ambient artificial lighting replacing natural light
exiting tunnel into brighter industrial area with large smokestack visible ahead

agents.ego_description: transiting through the tunnel and emerging into the industrial district

entered.detail: rough gray concrete walls with vertical support beams
overhead fluorescent lights casting red ambient glow
tall cylindrical industrial chimney with red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: Driving through the enclosed tunnel with artificial red lighting illuminating the concrete walls. The vehicle approaches the bright exit where an industrial smokestack becomes visible against the gray sky. Debris and litter line the sides of the tunnel road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with smokestacks and metal warehouses

events.description: exiting tunnel into open industrial zone with warehouses and overhead piping

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial streets with warehouses and metal structures

notable_agents.action: industrial truck driving ahead on the wet road

entered.detail: large industrial building with rusted corrugated metal siding
tall metal security fence with barbed wire topping
network of large metal pipes and conduits spanning across the road
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and tags

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a sprawling industrial district dominated by a large smokestack and corrugated metal warehouses. The vehicle navigates past chain-link fences and graffiti-covered walls while following an industrial truck. Overhead pipes and conduits crisscross above the rain-soaked road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a rain-slicked commercial center through a subterranean passage into a gritty industrial wasteland. It begins by navigating a wet asphalt road lined with modern glass buildings and digital billboards, where pedestrians with umbrellas huddle under an overcast, rainy sky. As the vehicle moves forward, the scenery shifts toward an industrial zone, passing under massive concrete overpasses and orange construction barriers that lead toward a narrowing tunnel entrance. The camera then enters the enclosed tunnel, moving through artificial red lighting and roadside debris before approaching a bright exit that reveals a distant smokestack. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the tunnel into a sprawling district of corrugated metal warehouses and graffiti-covered walls, following an industrial truck beneath a network of overhead pipes and conduits.
